=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/catchToOrElseSucceed_preview.ts(5,3): suggestion TS377095: `Effect.orElseSucceed` expresses the same recovery more directly than `Effect.catchAll` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(catchToOrElseSucceed)


==== /.src/catchToOrElseSucceed_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export const program = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
      Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.succeed(42))
      ~~~~~~~!!! suggestion TS377095: `Effect.orElseSucceed` expresses the same recovery more directly than `Effect.catchAll` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(catchToOrElseSucceed)
    )
